category_sources: source_facts.description says content analysis toolkit; official Apache Tika README describes detecting and extracting metadata and text from many file types.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://tika.apache.org/ and official repository README use the name Apache Tika.
docs_sources: Official Apache Tika site navigation lists versioned Getting Started and API Documentation pages.
repo_sources: Official Apache Tika source repository page states the online repository is https://github.com/apache/tika/ and shows the git clone command.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies content analysis; official Apache Tika README describes metadata/text extraction and command-line usage.
